title: Dav's Special Sauce
description: [Forge 1.20.1] A tech modpack more on the lightweight side with good performance and Distant Horizons.
body:
# Hello, Hi and Welcome.
I have been planning this modpack in a google doc for a few weeks before the first release version, and roughly week of in-game testing. This modpack was initially for use with a friend group, but i have decided to make it a public modpack.

This tech modpack is partly inspired by Tekkit and by direwolf20's FTB modpacks, but as i wished to mod a modern version of the game it meant i wouldn't be able to use IndustrialCraft, Buildcraft and Redpower, i have opted to skip Project Red for now as i do not wish to bother with adding in mods from outside of modrinth, me lazy.
Thus i have chosen the Thermal series of mods to replace most of IC2's gameplay loop, and Extreme Reactors for nuclear energy. The feature i wanted most out of Buildcraft was oil processing which i have replaced with the Diesel Generators addon for Create, initially i had planned for Immersive Petrolium for Immersive Engineering but it is complicated and not on modrinth so rip. All the other mods are ones i found to be very nice to use, and also a handful of performance mods. Oh and there is also Distant Horisons, i am in love with Distant Horisons.

I have not made any configurations to the config files of Almost Unified as i had found no issues in my first round of testing.

Performance has been deemed very good on a Laptop with a 9750H and a 1660ti, setting the allocated ram to 4 gigs should do the job quite well.

# Mod List
## Tech:
- Create
  - Big cannons
  - Central kitchen
  - Clockwork (bridges create with Valkyrien Skies)
  - Crafts and additions
  - Ore excavation
  - Sifting
  - Slice and dice
  - Bells & whistles
  - Connected
  - Design n’ decor
  - Diesel generators
  - Estrogen
  - New age
  - Steam n rails
  - Trackwork (Also bridges with Valkyrien Skies)
- EnderIO
- Extreme Reactors
- Immersive Engineering
  - Engineered Compatibility
- Refined Storage
- Thermal Foundation
  - Dynamics
  - Expansion
  - Innovation
  - Integration
  - Locomotion

## Utility:
- Almost Unified
- Appleskin
- CC:Tweaked
- Distant Horizons
- ElevatorMod
- Essential Mod

- Farmer’s Delight
- Functional Storage
- Immersive Aircraft
- Iron Chests: Restocked
- Jade
  - Jade addons
- Just enough items

  - Just enough immersive multiblocks
  - Just enough professions
  - Just enough resources
  - Enchantment descriptions
- Mouse Tweaks
- No Chat Reports
- Not Enough Animations

- Redstone Pen
- RightClickHarvest
- Thingamajigs
- Tinkers' Construct

## Optimisation:
